description.zh: 你好。听好了，雇佣兵，我和Lightkeepers安排了一次清单上物资运送的测试。我觉得这是一个接近他的机会。这就是我想跟你说的。传言说你们俩之间有着信任问题，那我们就互帮互助吧。你帮我找到所需的物资，而我帮你完成运输。我会替你美言几句的。行，他需要的是...啊，他需要狙击步枪，需要很多很多。
description.en: Hello. Listen, mercenary, I've made arrangements with Lightkeeper for a test delivery of the supplies he needs from the list. I think I might be able to get close to him. That's what I wanted to talk to you about. There's a rumor going around that you two have trust issues. So let's help each other. You find me the supplies I need, and I'll handle the transportation. I'll put in a good word for you. Okay, he needs... Whoa. He needs sniper rifles, and lots of them.

5c46fbd72e2216398b5a8c9c.zh: 德拉贡诺夫 SVDS 7.62x54 半自动狙击步枪

name.zh: 破镜重圆 - 收买人心
